🎓 Free Courses6 available

BeginnerFREE
Painting and Drawing · 6 weeks

Introduction to Painting and Drawing in Facility Management

This beginner's course covers the fundamentals of painting and drawing in the context of facility management, exploring global best practices and Pakistani real-world examples. Students will learn the basics of color theory, drawing techniques, and painting methods, as well as how to apply these skills in a facility management setting. By the end of the course, students will be able to create their own facility management-related artwork and apply painting and drawing principles to real-world problems.

Details →Enroll Free
BeginnerFREE
Programming · 6 weeks

Python Programming for Beginners

Learn the fundamentals of Python programming and start building your own projects with this beginner-friendly course. Through real-world examples from Pakistan and around the globe, you'll gain hands-on experience with Python. By the end of this course, you'll be able to write your own Python scripts and programs.

Details →Enroll Free
BeginnerFREE
Industrial Automation

Introduction to Industrial Automation: PLC, SCADA, HMI & VFD Systems

This course introduces the fundamentals of industrial automation systems, focusing on key technologies including Programmable Logic Controllers (PLC), SCADA systems, Human Machine Interface (HMI), and Variable Frequency Drives (VFD). Learners will understand how automation is used to control and monitor industrial processes in factories, plants, and building systems. The course covers basic PLC logic, SCADA monitoring, HMI operation, and VFD speed control for motors. It also explains the integration of these systems in real applications such as motor control, process automation, and energy optimization. By the end of this course, learners will gain a clear understanding of automation architecture and basic troubleshooting, making it ideal for beginners entering the industrial and maintenance field.

Details →Enroll Free
IntermediateFREE
Maintenance

Industrial Circuit Breakers & Protection Systems (MCB, MCCB, ACB)

This course provides a practical and industry-focused understanding of industrial circuit breakers and protection systems, designed for maintenance engineers and technicians. It covers the working principles, applications, and selection of MCB, MCCB, and Air Circuit Breakers (ACB) used in low-voltage electrical systems. Learners will understand overload, short-circuit, and fault protection, along with breaker tripping characteristics and coordination. The course also explains the role of breakers in distribution panels, motor control centers (MCC), and industrial plants. Special emphasis is given to maintenance practices, including inspection, testing, troubleshooting, and safe isolation procedures (LOTO). Real-world scenarios from industrial environments such as steel plants and commercial buildings are included. By the end of this course, learners will be able to identify, operate, and maintain circuit breakers safely and efficiently.

Details →Enroll Free
BeginnerFREE
Artificial Intelligence · 4 weeks

Introduction to Artificial Intelligence (AI) – Beginner Friendly

Artificial Intelligence (AI) is transforming the world around us. From smart assistants and recommendation systems to self-driving cars and advanced robotics, AI is becoming a key part of modern technology. This beginner-friendly course introduces the fundamentals of Artificial Intelligence and helps learners understand how intelligent systems work. Students will explore the history of AI, basic concepts of machine learning, real-world applications, and the future of AI technology. By the end of this course, learners will have a strong foundation in AI concepts and understand how artificial intelligence is used in industries such as healthcare, finance, automation, and technology. This course is designed for beginners with no prior AI knowledge and is perfect for students, professionals, and anyone interested in learning about artificial intelligence. What you will learn: • What Artificial Intelligence is and how it works • The difference between AI, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning • Real-world applications of AI • Basic concepts behind AI systems • The future of Artificial Intelligence Start your journey into the world of Artificial Intelligence today.

Details →Enroll Free
BeginnerFREE
Engineering / HVAC / Facility Management · 4

HVAC Maintenance & Troubleshooting Mastery

Learn professional HVAC maintenance, troubleshooting, and system diagnostics used in real facility management and building services. This course covers chilled water systems, FCU/FAHU maintenance, pumps, valves, electrical controls, and preventive maintenance strategies used in commercial buildings and district cooling systems.

Details →Enroll Free
